title: Target Highlight ( TargetHilite)
text: Target Highlight ( TargetHilite) Type of highlighting used for the target widget when a valid object is dragged over it. TargetHilite = " None | Frame | Halftone " Value Description None (default) The widget frame is not highlighted. (Default). Frame The widget frame (normal or 3-D) is displayed. Ignored if the Frame property is true. Halftone A wide halftone frame is drawn around the widget. Use if the Frame property is true. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fldproperties(DDFLD) = "TargetHilite=frame" Copy Applies To DropTarget Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
